meta.description: Per-crop growth state, BBCH stage, and companion planting data (KB-aligned v2.0 crop mix)

crops.name: Potato
crops.bbch_description: Tuber initiation — stolon tips swelling into tubers
crops.companion: Basil (antifungal VOCs, linalool + eugenol suppress Phytophthora spores)
crops.notes: Cycle 2 in progress. First harvest (cycle 1) yielded 225 kg at Sol 90. Hilling performed Sol 130. Tuber formation confirmed via soil probe. Basil trimmings distributed throughout zone for antifungal protection.

crops.name: Soybean
crops.companion: Lentil (shared N-fixation, Bradyrhizobium + Rhizobium complementary root zones, -18% nutrient input)
crops.notes: Cycle 2 in progress. Rhizobium inoculant active. Nodulation confirmed Sol 38. First harvest (cycle 1) yielded 4.5 kg dried beans. Flowering is the most radiation-vulnerable stage — monitoring CME alerts.

crops.name: Lentil
crops.bbch_description: Beginning of pod development — pods visible, seeds starting to fill
crops.companion: Soybean (shared N-fixation zone, complementary root depths)
crops.notes: Cycle 2 in progress. Compact variety selected for dome height constraints. First pods Sol 130. First harvest (cycle 1) yielded 2.0 kg dried lentils. Dr. Okonkwo's lentil soup supply.

crops.name: Lettuce
crops.bbch_description: Head development — leaves curving inward, head beginning to form
crops.companion: Spinach (staggered harvest cycles, shared leafy green zone management)
crops.notes: Cycle 4 in progress. Previous harvests: Sol 35, Sol 75, Sol 115. Each cycle yielding ~40 kg. Vitamin K powerhouse — 126.3 ug/100g. Tip burn watch: calcium uptake stable. Bolting threshold 24C — temperature monitoring active.

crops.name: Spinach
crops.bbch_description: Harvestable size — leaves large enough for cut-and-come-again harvest
crops.companion: Lettuce (interleaved harvest schedule provides continuous fresh greens)
crops.notes: Cycle 3 in progress. Previous harvests: Sol 45, Sol 95. Cut-and-come-again method active. Cmdr. Chen's preferred green — requested 3x this week. Bolting risk threshold: 25C.

crops.name: Radish
crops.bbch_description: Root filling — root reaching harvestable size, rapid diameter increase
crops.companion: Lettuce (trap crop role, protects nearby leafy greens from pests)
crops.notes: Cycle 5 in progress. Previous harvests: Sol 25, Sol 55, Sol 85, Sol 115. 'Radish Day' tradition — Spc. Reyes pulls first radish each cycle. Fastest turnaround in greenhouse. 17.5 kg per cycle. Crew morale anchor.

crops.name: Basil
crops.bbch_description: Vegetative growth — multiple leaf pairs, branching established
crops.companion: Potato (antifungal VOCs — linalool and eugenol suppress Phytophthora and Botrytis spore germination in closed dome)
crops.notes: Cycle 5 in progress. Trimmings distributed to potato zone for antifungal protection. Pinching flower buds to extend vegetative growth and VOC production. 2.4 kg per cycle. Dual role: culinary herb + biological pest management.

crops.name: Microgreens
crops.bbch_description: Cotyledon fully open, first true leaf emerging
crops.notes: Mixed species tray (broccoli, kale, sunflower, radish microgreens). 10-14 day cycle. Emergency vitamin bridge — not modeled in production projections. Current tray is cycle 11. Provides concentrated vitamins A, C, K, E in small volume.
